snippet.title: Battlefield 6 Season 4 Naval Official Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Naval warfare has arrived, bringing all-out combat across land, air, and sea. 

Deploy to Tsuru Reef, our biggest battlefield yet, where sprawling islands, dynamic waves, boats, jets, helicopters, and ground vehicles collide in massive battles. Command the coastline with the RCB-90 Patrol Boat or race through the surf in the 7.7m NSW RHIB. 

Expand your arsenal with four new weapons, including the long-range Interdictor sniper rifle, then climb the ranks in a brand-new Ranked Battle Royale season packed with fresh rewards. And later in the season, Wake Island returns. 

Prepare to deploy when Season 4 launches on July 21.

#Battlefield6

snippet.title: DIGGER | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Digg. Or Die. DIGGER. Only in theaters October 2. #Diggermovie



Academy Award winner Tom Cruise stars in Academy Award-winning filmmaker Alejandro G. Iñárritu’s original film “Digger,” from Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures.
The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity’s savior before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything.
Cruise stars in the title role, alongside Oscar winner Riz Ahmed, John Goodman, Oscar nominee Sandra Hüller, Michael Stuhlbarg, and Oscar nominee Jesse Plemons.  Robert John Burke, Emma D’Arcy, Burn Gorman and Sophie Wilde also star. 
Iñárritu directed from a screenplay by Iñárritu & Oscar-winners Alexander Dinelaris & Nicolás Giacobone, and Sabina Berman, story by Iñárritu & Berman.  The film is produced by Iñárritu, Oscar nominee Mary Parent, Cruise and Michael Sharp, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Berman, Dinelaris, Giacobone, Jez Butterworth and Emmanuel Lubezki.
Joining Iñárritu behind the camera are previous collaborators Oscar-winning director of photography Emmanuel Lubezki; editors Conor O’Neill and Oscar winner Stephen Mirrone; Oscar-nominated costume designer Jacqueline West; Oscar-winning makeup and hair designer Alessandro Bertolazzi; and Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler; along with Oscar-winning production designer Dennis Gassner and production designer Richard Johnson, Oscar-winning prosthetic makeup designer Kazu Hiro, and composer Cosmo Sheldrake.
An Alejandro G. Iñárritu Film, “Digger” was shot entirely in VistaVision and will be released in theaters and IMAX® across North America on October 2, 2026, and internationally beginning 30 September 2026.  It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Queens of the Stone Age - Easy Street (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Featuring Nikki Lane 
Stream "Easy Street": https://qotsa.lnk.to/easystreet 

See QOTSA on tour https://qotsa.com/tour/ 
Follow QOTSA: http://www.qotsa.com/ 
https://www.facebook.com/QOTSA 
https://www.instagram.com/queensofthestoneage 
https://www.tiktok.com/@qotsa 
https://x.com/qotsa 

Easy Street:
I’m chandeleering, now I’m fearing the worst
I hang from the ceiling, hear you pray for my curse
Those sposed to love me the most
Are breaking my heart
Wish I could share a bit more
Too petrified

The sound of your voice & the things that you say
Just shut up & fuck me or shut up & go away
You drive me crazy for sure
But I can do that myself

If you need me come & see me on Easy Street
I ain’t hard to find
Down on the floor, under the couch,
are the keys to life
Been there the whole time

“Violence is never the answer” you say?
I question how he’s not been punched in the face
I’m not like that anymore
Been dead a long time
I don’t believe in luck
So you can have mine

Drinking won’t help, but it sure blocks out the help
Don’t ruin the vibe, I do all that by myself
Sorry for your loss,
But you lost.

If you need me come & see me on Easy Street
I ain’t hard to find
Amazing to be lost in a maze, you made up in your mind.
Made up in your mind

snippet.description:
#TheJetsons #JimCarrey #AmyAdams #liveaction 

THE JETSONS (2027) — Live Action Concept Trailer
We live above the clouds. Eight million people. And not one of us has ever touched the ground.
Sixty years ago humanity left Earth behind and built Orbit City... a gleaming metropolis floating in the sky where everything runs on its own. The cars fly themselves. The sidewalks carry you. The machines think for you. Nobody asks what holds it all together. Nobody looks down.
George Jetson is a maintenance tech at Spacely Space Sprockets. He is not a genius. He is not a hero. He is just a guy who shows up and stares at numbers nobody else cares about. But when those numbers start telling a story the whole city is ignoring... George becomes the only person standing between eight million lives and the fall.
With his wife by his side... his kids behind him... an old robot who refuses to be left behind... and a dog who was already in the car... the Jetsons go where no family has gone in three generations.
Below the clouds. Below everything. Back to Earth.
The future runs on family.

Wow! Been a while since I've uploaded, huh? Just so everyone is aware, but yes, the account was compromised and hacked. Luckily, Google/YouTube caught wind of it very fast and restricted the account. The resulted in the "Jacob Alpharad" channel disappearing for about a week... which was very scary!

Eventually, the staff at Google reinstated my account back to me, but I somehow lost access to my YouTube channel. Despite it being restored, it was still floating in the sea of nothingness without a proper owner. It was a very strange situation that the staff helping me said they have never seen before. So fast forward about 2 weeks later and I'm finally back and ready to start uploading again... I hope this one was worth the wait. :D

snippet.title: The Dog Stars | Official Trailer | In Theaters August 28
snippet.description:
The world that was doesn’t exist. THE DOG STARS, a Ridley Scott film, starring Jacob Elordi, Josh Brolin, and Margaret Qualley, arrives in theaters and IMAX August 28.

Based on Peter Heller’s captivating bestseller, “The Dog Stars” features a critically acclaimed ensemble, including Jacob Elordi, Josh Brolin, Margaret Qualley, Allison Janney, Benedict Wong, and Guy Pearce. The screenplay is by Mark L. Smith, based upon the novel by Peter Heller, and the producers are Ridley Scott, p.g.a., Michael Pruss, p.g.a., Mark L. Smith, and Cliff Roberts, p.g.a., with Lily Brooks-Dalton, Brandon Scott Smith, Peter Heller, Aidan Elliott serving as executive producers.
 
The film tells the story of Hig (Jacob Elordi), a young pilot who, together with a military survivalist, Bangley (Josh Brolin), has carved out an efficient but isolated homestead in a brutal post-apocalyptic world. But when Hig receives a mysterious radio transmission, he ventures into the unknown in search of the hope and humanity he still believes exist.

snippet.title: Drag Race Down Under vs The World | Season 1 Trailer | WOW Presents Plus
snippet.description:
Herstory will be made! Drag Race Down Under vs The World hosted by Michelle Visage premieres July 24 on WOW Presents Plus: https://bit.ly/4eBYwr4

Five iconic Drag Race Down Under queens will battle six formidable drag artists from around the world, each representing their own country and international series of Drag Race. Hosted by Michelle Visage, the eleven queens will compete in a variety of challenges and runways to test their charisma, uniqueness, nerve and talent.

Subscribe: http://youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=wowpresents

World of Wonder has reshaped international pop culture, earning 33 Emmys, inspiring two Oscars, creating global network WOW Presents Plus, and bringing drag culture to the world stage via Drag Race and DragCon. Watch the Drag Race franchise and exclusive WOW Originals on WOW Presents Plus.
